items.title: Fury in France after child murder suspect's criminal record released
items.summary: A man suspected of murdering an 11-year-old girl had previously been identified as a potential child molester, records show.

items.title: 3 Mule Deer Inaugurate California’s Newest Wildlife Crossing Bridge
items.summary: A California wildlife overpass is already proving popular with the local deer—and it’s not even finished yet. In what is certainly a ringing endorsement of the $20 million bridge, 3 mule deer were cau…
